tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

(Single Strum)
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
There stands the glass[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
That will ease all my pain[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
That will settle my brain[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
It's my first one today[/tab]

(Begin Strumming)

[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
There stands the glass[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
That-that will ease all my pain[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
That-that will settle my brain[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
It's-it's my first one today[/tab]


[Verse 1]

Ayy
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
I saw your sister at work[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
I saw your mama at church[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
I'm pretty sure I saw your car at the mall[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
I see your face in the clouds[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
I smell your perfume in crowds[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
I swear your number's all my phone wants to call[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]
It's kinda funny how I can't seem[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
To get away from you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
It's almost like you don't want me to[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
You've got a cold heart and the cold hard truth[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
I got a bottle of whiskey, but I got no proof[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
That you showed up tonight[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
In that dress just to mess with my head[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
So much for so long[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
Out of sight, out of mind[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
Girl, you're lookin' so good[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]
It's drivin' me out of mind[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh, you're breakin' my heart[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, you're playin' hard to forget[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
Told me to leave all your things[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Out on the porch, on the swing[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]A[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
You'll come and grab 'em by the end of the week[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D[/ch]
Well, it's just some jeans and a shirt[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
But it's a whole lot of hurt[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
I think I know why you've been dragging your feet[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]
Ain't it funny how I can't seem[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
To get away from you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
It's almost like you don't want me to[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
You've got a cold heart and the cold hard truth[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
I got a bottle of whiskey, but I got no proof[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
That you showed up tonight[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
In that dress just to mess with my head[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
So much for so long[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
Out of sight, out of mind[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
Girl, you're lookin' so good[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]
It's drivin' me out of mine[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh, you're breakin' my heart[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, you're playin' hard to forget[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
There stands the glass[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
That-that will ease all my pain[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
That-that will settle my brain[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
It's-it's my first one today[/tab]

[Chorus]

(Single Strum)
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
You've got a cold heart and the cold hard truth[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
I got a bottle of whiskey, but I got no proof[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
That you showed up tonight[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
In that dress just to mess with my head[/tab]

(Begin Strumming)

[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
So much for so long[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
Out of sight, out of mind[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
Girl, you're lookin' so good[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]
It's drivin' me out of mine[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh, you're breakin' my heart[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Baby, you're playin' hard to forget[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]                [ch]Bm[/ch]
Oh honey, I'm fallin' apart[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
And you're playin' hard to forget[/tab]
